content:
* [Recognize Truth and Reconciliation Day] We acknowledge that we are gathered on the traditional and unceded territory of the Algonquin Anishinaabe Nation. For generations, they have been the stewards of this land, and their deep connection to it continues to this day. We recognize the enduring presence and contributions of the Algonquin people to this region. We also acknowledge the painful history of colonization and the displacement of Indigenous communities from their ancestral lands. We commit ourselves to learning, understanding, and honoring the Algonquin Nation's history and culture. We recognize the importance of working collaboratively to create a more just and equitable future for all who call this land home.
________________
sentences: [Recognize Truth and Reconciliation Day] We acknowledge that we are gathered on the traditional and unceded territory of the Algonquin Anishinaabe Nation.
For generations, they have been the stewards of this land, and their deep connection to it continues to this day.
We recognize the enduring presence and contributions of the Algonquin people to this region.
We also acknowledge the painful history of colonization and the displacement of Indigenous communities from their ancestral lands.
We commit ourselves to learning, understanding, and honoring the Algonquin Nation's history and culture.

We recognize the importance of working collaboratively to create a more just and equitable future for all who call this land home.
________________

content:
* Ashna: uOttawa has to bid for both ESSCO and CFES conferences every so often. VP Services of ESSCO/CFES says we are not due to bid until next year. I talked to them and think it is good to bid for the above which is good for us. We could wait, but don’t want to be left with a larger conference that is harder to do, especially if I am no longer around. SDES is larger (National), leading me to choose ESSCO (Ontario) PM.
* Hayley: I worry that…
* Cyrus: Is there money involved?
* Ashna: There is a budget required in the bid but a portion is covered by the ESSCO/CFES and some would be applied for from EEF.
* Cyrus: Sponsors? C&R? VEMS?
* Ashna: We can chat about logistics later. ESSCO PM is an ESSCO Conference out of 2 coming up. We can bid for ESSCO PM at FYIC or CALE. I think CALE is better as there isn’t much time to prepare for FYIC.
* Aiden: Third time is a charm!
* Eric: Gonna ask bod? Just need to get votes as it involves society finances.
* Ashna: Okay. For the bid I have to prepare a template for the organizing committee. If you are interested in joining let me know.
sentences: * Ashna: uOttawa has to bid for both ESSCO and CFES conferences every so often.
VP Services of ESSCO/CFES says we are not due to bid until next year.
I talked to them and think it is good to bid for the above which is good for us.
We could wait, but don’t want to be left with a larger conference that is harder to do, especially if I am no longer around.
SDES is larger (National), leading me to choose ESSCO (Ontario) PM.

C&R? VEMS?

ESSCO PM is an ESSCO Conference out of 2 coming up.
We can bid for ESSCO PM at FYIC or CALE.
I think CALE is better as there isn’t much time to prepare for FYIC.
Aiden: Third time is a charm!
Eric: Gonna ask bod?
Just need to get votes as it involves society finances.
* Ashna: Okay.
For the bid I have to prepare a template for the organizing committee.
If you are interested in joining let me know.

content:
* Hayley: Carleton reached out and they wanted to do something like they did in the past with Telfer.
* Ashna: Me and Alper chatted but we don’t have much info. Emailed (organizer?) and wants to set up a meeting. I wanted to know logistics like dates etc. Want to see if this is something we want to do???
* Hayley: If this is a fundraiser then we shouldn't incur cost.
* Ashna: We have past costs and shou
* Hayley: IMO, if only 300 estimated to be made, seems like a lot of work unless logistics are already done.
* Eric: If it is a fundraising event, involve Zoe.
* Cyrus: Is there interest in hockey?
* Alper: Yes, we have people reaching out.
* Hayley: Use money for jerseys to keep each year. Pay to watch not pay to play.
* Ashna: Worried because I am being told I would need to pay for SDES. Alper and I will have a convo. Leaving Zoe out as this is not a fundraiser for external organizations.
* Cyrus: Option to purchase and keep jersey?
* Hayley: Keep them year round, ESS branded
* VPFA: October Monster: Covies4Monster?? Thoughts??
* Cyrus: Switch it up for October from Math. Similar to WWWC??
* Hayley: Improve WWWC and add Monster to it as well.
* Conall: Halloween costume for Monster.
* Hayley: For 3 weeks do WWWC. Last week and leading to DUSTED, do costumes.

content:
* VP COMMS: Please stop making your own threads in the promo request channel, just submit the form and have patience - it’s how me and Conall keep track of who’s started what.
* VPFA: Please stop sending me receipts and invoices via discord, use the Reimbursement google form setup for the process. If you need to get reimbursed, complete the F1 form, then attach the receipt/invoice BELOW the aforementioned document. Ryn will be taking care of reimbursements for the next few weeks. Reach out to them for any clarifications.
